title: oenothera australis
intro: Oenothera australis, also known as the Australian evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its high concentration of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oenothera australis include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into supplements, teas, or topical creams, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of menopause, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions.
